overall_comment: Both required figures are clean, style-guide-compliant, and communicate the analytical-zero MSE result convincingly; only cosmetic minors.

issues.issue: The numeric metric value (MSE = 0.00e+00) is not explicitly inline-annotated on the narrative panel; reader has to infer 'fit is near-perfect' from the residual band plot.
issues.fix: Add a small text annotation in the top panel, e.g. ax.text(0.02, 0.95, 'MSE = 0.00e+00 (TARGET HIT, <0.01)', transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10).

issues.issue: Callout annotation text 'even envelope = 0.1 x^2' with parenthetical (1/2)[y(-4)+y(4)] ~= 1.6 is slightly dense and nearly collides with the title/top spine.
issues.fix: Move callouts down ~5% in axes-fraction coordinates or shorten parenthetical.

issues.issue: The 'our fit' bar sits at ~1e-19 on a log axis but is labeled 0.00e+00 - log(0) is undefined, so the tiny visible sliver is a plotting floor artifact that may confuse a careful reader.
issues.fix: Clip y-axis at 1e-16 and annotate as 'MSE = 0 (exact)' or replace with a downward-arrow marker.

issues.issue: Right-hand panel is mostly whitespace - per-seed table and 'TARGET HIT' banner read as a footnote.
issues.fix: Use GridSpec width_ratios=[2, 1] or enlarge table font to fontsize=12.

issues.issue: No cross-seed variance shown; acceptable since evaluator is deterministic but a 'std = 0.00e+00 (deterministic)' row would pre-empt skepticism.
issues.fix: Add a 'std = 0.00e+00' row to the per-seed table.
